Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
242 
PRE_ICL_INP_COINS_1M 
LABEL: 
Pre-ICL Coinsurance Standard Retail — One-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy) during the 
pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 
TYPE:
